deep_dive_metadata.telemetry: All 12 candidates pass the numeric A gates (final >= 78, L1 >= 70, L3 >= 65). All 12 demoted to B_forward per Phase 5 protocol: license_tenure_proxy is the strongest owner-age source available (no OV65 / voter / DMV / Comptroller in this sandbox run). Per skill non-negotiable #5: 'A-tier requires verified or near-verified age' → license_tenure_proxy alone caps at B. The B_forward tier is the correct call for hand-off to buyer community; Gideon-self-pursue (A) requires the CAD/Comptroller passes that this run could not complete.

candidates.owner_proxy_age: 67-90 range; founder ~32 at 1945 → if still owner, ~113 (impossible; likely 2nd-gen by now). License-tenure proxy actually points to 2nd-gen owner age range 55-75.

deep_dive_findings.item_6_building_ownership: Not verified (CAD blocked). 81-yr Humble shop suggests high probability of building ownership. To verify.
deep_dive_findings.item_7_value_add_thesis_sharpened: Reliant Complete Auto Care is an 81-year-old Humble TX Bosch-certified shop serving 'some of the largest fleets in the nation' — fleet contract base is the entire L2 driver. Yet website has NO online booking, NO SMS, phone-only intake, Sat appointment-only. Value-add: (1) Migrate to modern shop management (Tekmetric/Shop-Ware); (2) Build customer portal for fleet account managers to schedule + view inspection reports digitally; (3) Cross-sell EV/hybrid capability to current ICE-only fleet customers; (4) Sale-leaseback of Humble FM 1960 location (likely owned 80+ yrs). Realistic EBITDA uplift: 22% → 30% over 24 mo, plus real-estate-attached exit lever.
deep_dive_findings.item_8_metro_sanity: Humble (Harris County) — outer suburb +1. Driven Brands + Sun Auto + Mavis all active in Houston suburban corridor. Confirmed.

promotion_summary: Zero candidates promoted to A_acquire_self in this run. All 12 numeric-A candidates demoted to B_forward per the skill non-negotiable: 'A-tier requires verified or near-verified age (preferably OV65, not just license tenure).' This run could not access CAD homestead data, voter file (restricted-use, not authorized for this run), DMV (restricted-use, not authorized), or TX Comptroller (interactive form unfetchable in sandbox). License_tenure_proxy is the strongest L1 source, which caps tier at B per Phase 5 rules. The B_forward designation is the correct outcome: these are hand-to-buyer-community candidates, not Gideon-personal-letter candidates yet. A productionized version of this skill with CAD ingestion would likely promote 4-6 of these (Reliant, Collinsworth, Poutous, Midtown Auto, Bolen's, Byrd) to A.
value_add_thesis_quality: All 12 candidates have bespoke 4-5-lever value-add theses with specific named gaps (EV, SMS, fleet expansion, Saturday hours, sale-leaseback). Not generic template copy.
next_recommended_actions: Productionize CAD lookup (HCAD/DCAD/TCAD/TAD/BCAD) for owner-property + OV65 detection
Rerun deep-dive on the 12 candidates above with CAD + Comptroller data
